# Juniper MIBs

Download from: https://www.juniper.net/documentation/en_US/junos/topics/reference/general/junos-snmp-mibs-supported.html
(or your device's `/var/db/scripts` / support portal).

Common MIBs:
- `JUNIPER-SMI.my`
- `JUNIPER-MIB.my`
- `JUNIPER-IF-MIB.my`

Place downloaded files in this directory (not redistributed here due to licensing).
